title: acmella filipes var. parvifolia
intro: Acmella filipes var. parvifolia is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is also known as the 'Parvifolia Toothache Plant'. The medicinal properties of this plant come from its leaves, which contain compounds with analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular treatment for toothaches and other oral health issues. The health benefits of Acmella filipes var. parvifolia include pain relief, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in preventing infections. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
